case_title: DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC. VS. MAN NEI LUI ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC. AS TO ASSIGNEE IQ DATA INTERNATIONAL INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC. SERVED JAN-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE [$82.15 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC.
DECLARATION OF LYNN HALL IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 595 JOHN MUIR DRIVE #C513, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94132, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $480.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $2,580.98 AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROCE., (D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC.
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AT ISSUE. $1,643.17 RENT, $480.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,123.17, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, MAN NEI
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
